title: Supabase SQL — column 'business_name' does not exist
html:
Supabase SQL editor at 4 AM running select id, business_name from prospects where status = 'client' against the True Insights AI / AI Visibility Tool database — fails with 42703: column "business_name" does not exist. Side panel shows queued migrations: "Add missing columns to analyses," "Add JSONB columns to analyses," "White-label Multi-tenant Platform," "Onboarding and Engagement," "AI Visibility Tool Schema" — the schema-evolution backlog for Rankett's prospects/clients tables.

TL;DR

  • Supabase schema mid-evolution: prospects table missing business_name column at query time.
  • Migration backlog reveals the Rankett data model: prospects → clients pipeline, analyses with JSONB blobs, multi-tenant white-label tables.
  • 4 AM debugging cadence — late-night build mode is the Rankett norm.

supabase · rankett · ai visibility engine · ghost white label · true insights ai
